log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Gnome — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Gnome — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 20 damage. Gnome — Armored Escapist HP: 39/59
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 19 damage. Gnome — Armored Escapist HP: 20/59
--- Gnome — Armored Escapist --- HP: 20/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
